prompt: Using the provided reference image as the exact architectural reference — same villa, same materials, same pool, same palms, same U-shaped plan with two flanking volumes and open central terrace, same dark walnut vertical slat cladding on the upper floor, same white Calacatta marble structure, same LED strip lighting along every cantilevered slab edge, same long narrow rectangular lap pool. This is the final frame of a drone fly-over: the camera started at the far beach end of the pool (reference image position) and has flown forward over the pool toward the villa. The camera is now at low altitude — 1.2 meters above the pool surface — positioned approximately 5 meters from the villa facade, still facing the villa directly, perfectly centred and symmetrical. The villa now fills the entire frame, very close, looming large. The pool surface occupies the lower third of the frame in extreme forced perspective — the pool edge closest to camera is a thin bright line at the very bottom of the frame, the water stretching back toward the villa foundation where it meets the terrace. The pool water in the foreground is copper-bronze from the golden hour sky reflection, ripple highlights visible as bright horizontal lines. The villa facade is dramatically close: the ground floor overhang soffit is directly above and very prominent — its integrated LED strips run left-right in a warm amber hairline at close range, the teak soffit planking texture clearly visible above. The central courtyard is fully revealed: the long teak dining table and champagne chairs close and detailed, the concrete pendant lamp hanging low above the table, the stone-clad outdoor bar with backlit amber bottle shelving, the flush-mounted media wall on the courtyard back wall displaying a warm amber screensaver, uplight from the deck integrated lighting casting dramatic shadow patterns on the soffit above. Floor-to-ceiling glazing on the left wing reveals the kitchen in full detail — marble island, pendant lights, cabinetry. Right wing glazing shows the media room sofa and lit shelving very close. The floating curved staircase inside the central interior behind the courtyard is clearly visible. Upper floor: the dark walnut vertical slat cladding fills most of the upper frame, the white Calacatta marble slab edge of the upper floor cantilevering directly above at close range. The angled upper roof geometry foreshortened dramatically from below. LED strips along the upper slab edge are a warm amber hairline. The two Phoenix dactylifera date palms are now seen at close range — their trunks are at the left and right edges of the frame, trunks in warm golden raking sidelight, lower fronds visible overhead at the upper corners. Lighting: golden hour, sun 7 degrees above the western horizon behind the camera, raking warm amber light across the entire villa facade — the marble glows warm ivory-gold, right-facing surfaces brighter than left, the dark walnut slat cladding turns warm bronze. Deep shadow in the courtyard underside and overhang soffits contrasted with the warm courtyard interior glow. Sky: only a sliver is visible above the upper floor roofline — deep amber-gold fading to teal at the very top. Cinematic, intimate, architectural, monumental.
negative_prompt: CGI, 3D render, illustration, rendered, different architecture, camera facing away from villa, camera facing the sea, pool behind camera, no villa in frame, same distance as reference image, far away from villa, small villa in frame, different pool, different palm positions, palms on roof, empty courtyard, no furniture, weathering, staining, aging, road, street lights, cars, vehicles, power lines, debris, ornate Arabic details, minarets, domes, gold exterior cladding, Islamic patterns, garish colours, neon, club lighting, Instagram filter, HDR glow, lens flare, sun starburst, overexposed concrete, blown highlights, heavy vignette, watermark, tourism brochure, stock photography, isolated island, floating in water, artificial sky replacement, blue hour, night time, dark sky, pale sky, washed out sky, overcast, desaturated, no golden light
